support.why_not_vp: No CEO-irreplaceable lever: $100k deal, no blocked discount, no roadmap commitment, no exec peer relationship required. Multi-threading into the two-shareholder board and shipping the overdue reply/business case is standard AE/VP execution.

monitor.reason: We owe an overdue reply into a champion-led, blind head-to-head board decision on 20 Jul and are executing slowly.

triggers.summary: Our reply on BMi's maturity/business-case info is 10 days overdue, 2 weeks before a 20 Jul board vote
triggers.detail: Champion Petra Dorr (CPO, Decision Maker) provided her maturity and business-case information on 22 Jun and expected a Zycus reply by 26 Jun; that reply is still open/overdue. This is our lapse, not buyer-dependent - Petra already gave us the input we owe a response to. On the 3 Jul call she noted 'commercially we are not getting anywhere yet'. With a blind head-to-head evaluation ending in a two-shareholder board decision on 20 Jul (14 days out), our execution lag signals to Petra that Zycus cannot move at required speed and risks weakening her advocacy on this $100k Formal-Evaluation deal.
triggers.metric: Reply 10 days overdue (due 26 Jun, still open as of 6 Jul)
triggers.ceo_ask: Ask Dirk why our reply to Petra's 22 Jun maturity/business-case info is still overdue and whether the 8 Jul workshop and 20 Jul board deck are on track ahead of the head-to-head decision.
triggers.evidence: our_open_deliverables: 'Send reply to BMI's maturity and business case information' due 2026-06-26, status overdue; most recent touch is call 'Abstimmung BMi/Zycus' dated 2026-07-03 where Petra flagged commercial stall.
